subcodes.first_line: In this day the horizon of the world hath been illumined with the splendors of the appearance of the Most Great Luminary - the Prophets and Messengers, before and after Me [3.5s]... ...He is the true servant of God who, in this day, were he to pass through cities of silver and gold, would not deign to look upon them, and whose heart would remain pure and undefiled
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز افق عالم بانوار ظهور نیر اعظم منور انبیا و مرسلین از قبل و بعد من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @John the Baptist, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
